overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, following a green sedan through winding tropical roads during a heavy rainstorm at night. The vehicle navigates wet asphalt lined with palm trees, passes through a concrete tunnel, and emerges to continue the journey with neon-lit structures visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal highway with palm tree lining and rocky cliffs

events.description: rocky cliff walls appear on the left side as the road curves through mountainous terrain
approaching concrete tunnel entrance carved into the rock face

agents.ego_description: following a green sedan through winding wet roads, navigating curves with windshield wipers active against heavy rain

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving ahead with red taillights illuminated, occasionally braking on wet curves

entered.detail: vintage green sedan with glowing red taillights driving on the wet road ahead
tall tropical palm trees lining the left side of the highway
tall tropical palm trees lining the right side of the highway
metal guard rail with reflective yellow strips along the right roadside
tall street lamps casting warm orange-yellow light onto the wet pavement
steep rocky cliff face appearing on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a winding coastal highway during a heavy nighttime rainstorm, following a green sedan. Palm trees line both sides of the wet asphalt road, illuminated by warm streetlights. As the road curves, rocky cliff faces emerge on the left side, and the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance carved into the rock.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete tunnel with fluorescent overhead lighting

events.description: vehicle enters concrete tunnel from the rainy outdoor environment, transitioning to artificial lighting
tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with natural light and rain visible at the opening

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the enclosed tunnel while maintaining safe distance from the sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: green sedan maintaining steady speed through the tunnel

entered.detail: rough gray concrete tunnel walls with yellow painted safety strip at base
rough gray concrete tunnel walls with yellow painted safety strip at base
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling providing artificial illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete tunnel, leaving the rain and palm trees behind. Fluorescent lights illuminate the rough concrete walls as the car accelerates through the enclosed space. The green sedan remains ahead, its taillights glowing in the artificial light, while the tunnel exit becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway with neon-lit structures and palm trees

events.description: vehicle exits the tunnel back into the rainy outdoor environment with palm trees visible
neon-lit building with purple and blue lighting becomes visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing to follow the green sedan on the wet winding road, passing neon-lit structures

notable_agents.action: green sedan navigating the wet curves ahead with taillights glowing

entered.detail: palm trees returning to line the left side of the road after the tunnel
palm trees returning to line the right side of the road after the tunnel
modern building with distinctive purple and blue neon lighting accents
metal guard rail resuming along the right side of the road
warm yellow streetlights illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle returns to the rainy outdoor environment with palm trees once again lining the road. A building with vibrant purple and blue neon lighting appears on the right side, characteristic of the Cyberpunk aesthetic. The green sedan continues ahead on the wet asphalt as the journey proceeds along the winding highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked coastal highway that transitions from a palm-lined road into a rocky mountain pass. It begins by trailing a green sedan through a heavy nighttime rainstorm, where warm streetlights reflect off the wet asphalt and illuminate rows of palm trees. As the vehicle navigates the winding curves of the highway, the lush greenery gives way to imposing rocky cliff faces that rise sharply on the left. The scene then shifts as the road narrows, leading the camera directly toward a dark tunnel entrance carved deep into the stone.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a sterile, enclosed tunnel back into a rain-soaked tropical night. It begins by entering a concrete tunnel, leaving the palm trees behind as fluorescent lights illuminate the rough walls and the green sedan accelerates forward. As the car nears the end of the passage, the artificial glow of the tunnel gives way to the dim, rainy outdoor environment. The scene then opens back onto the wet asphalt highway, where the road is once again lined with palm trees and a building with vibrant purple and blue neon lighting emerges on the right. Finally, the camera continues to follow the sedan as it navigates the winding, neon-lit road through the storm.
